name_en: 🆕 Chip Version M60143 Khaki. Crafted from luxurious Mahina leather, this Iris wallet is an exquisite and charming accessory. It features soft calfskin with perforated Monogram pattern and a discreet snap closure.
name_cn:
🆕 Chip Version M60143 Khaki. Crafted from luxurious Mahina leather, this Iris wallet is an exquisite and charming accessory. It features soft calfskin with perforated Monogram pattern and a discreet snap closure.
Dimensions: 12 x 19 x 2
